results.command: env BIN=/data/tmp/frankenredis-ohsk5-pass157-baseline-target/release/frankenredis PORT=24163 BENCH=./legacy_redis_code/redis/src/redis-benchmark bash -lc '"$BIN" --port "$PORT" >/tmp/fr_set2_base.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; trap "kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT; for _ in $(seq 1 50); do ss -ltn 2>/dev/null | grep -q :$PORT && break; sleep 0.1; done; "$BENCH" -p "$PORT" -t set -n 2000000 -c 50 -P 16 -r 100000 -q >/dev/null'

env BIN=/data/tmp/frankenredis-ohsk5-pass157-setreply-candidate-target/release/frankenredis PORT=24164 BENCH=./legacy_redis_code/redis/src/redis-benchmark bash -lc '"$BIN" --port "$PORT" >/tmp/fr_set2_cand.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; trap "kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT; for _ in $(seq 1 50); do ss -ltn 2>/dev/null | grep -q :$PORT && break; sleep 0.1; done; "$BENCH" -p "$PORT" -t set -n 2000000 -c 50 -P 16 -r 100000 -q >/dev/null'
